dc_description: A blurred close-up of an orange-and-black backpack or bag occupies the lower foreground. Beyond it, a narrow paved road curves gently to the right through a dry rural landscape with golden grasses, shrubs, and scattered trees. Hazy hills or low mountains are visible in the distance under a pale, mostly clear sky.
novel_visual_observations: Several faint dark circular spots are visible near the top of the sky, likely lens or sensor marks. The road has a light edge line and roadside marker posts, but no vehicles or people are visible.
location_name: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Siena
rich_context: Strada Provinciale di Radicofani, Radicofani, Unione dei Comuni Amiata Val d'Orcia, Siena, Toscana, Italia
